---
title: "Shreds and Patches, or, Passages from the Lives of the Molyneuxes"
---

## Shreds and Patches, or, Passages from the Lives of the Molyneuxes

**Author:** E. N. Leigh-Fry
**Date:** 1890
**Imprint:** London: Smith and Innes

### Notes

Pseudonym of Ella Napier Lefroy.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
